$schema_note: Frontend architecture definition — React SPA for the Legacy IT Student Portal

stack.build_tool: Vite 5 (fast HMR, route-level code splitting, env via import.meta.env)
stack.styling: Tailwind CSS 3 + shadcn/ui (Radix primitives, copied-in components — no heavy UI dependency)
stack.routing: React Router v6 (createBrowserRouter, lazy route modules)
stack.server_state: TanStack Query v5 (caching, retries, optimistic updates, invalidation on socket events)
stack.client_state: Zustand (auth session, UI preferences, active-session store)
stack.forms: react-hook-form + zod resolvers (schemas imported from packages/shared — same validation as the API)
stack.qr_display: qrcode.react (renders the encrypted payload pushed by the server)
stack.http: axios instance with interceptors (attach access token, transparent refresh on 401, error normalization)
stack.pwa: vite-plugin-pwa — installable, offline shell for the scanner page (scan submission still requires connectivity in Phase 1)

apps/web/src/: features/<module>/ → pages/, components/, hooks/, api.ts (module-scoped TanStack Query hooks)
components/ui/ (shadcn/ui primitives), components/layout/ (AppShell, Sidebar, Topbar, PageHeader)
components/common/ (DataTable, EmptyState, ErrorState, ConfirmDialog, StatusBadge, StatCard)

layout.app_shell: Collapsible sidebar (desktop ≥1024px) / drawer (mobile) + topbar (global search, notification bell with unread badge, theme toggle, profile menu)
layout.content: Max-width container, PageHeader (title, breadcrumbs, primary action), consistent card-based sections
layout.responsive_breakpoints: Tailwind defaults — sm 640, md 768, lg 1024, xl 1280; mobile-first
layout.theme: Light/dark via CSS variables (shadcn/ui token convention); institutional primary color; WCAG AA contrast; prefers-reduced-motion respected
special_fullscreen_routes: Faculty live QR display (projector mode — QR + class name + live counter, no chrome)

routing_and_guards.guarded: RequireAuth wrapper → redirects to /login; RequireRole(roles) per route group; module feature flags hide disabled routes (404)
routing_and_guards.lazy_loading: Each feature's routes are a lazy chunk; initial bundle target < 200KB gzipped

auth_handling.access_token: Kept in memory (Zustand) only — never localStorage
auth_handling.refresh: httpOnly cookie; axios interceptor calls /auth/refresh once on 401 then retries queued requests; hard logout on refresh failure

data_conventions.invalidation: Socket events invalidate related queries (attendance:recorded → session roster + dashboard)
data_conventions.tables: Shared DataTable: server-side pagination/sort/filter, column visibility, empty/loading/error states, row actions by permission
data_conventions.feedback: Toasts (sonner) for outcomes; inline field errors from zod; skeletons for loading; ErrorBoundary per route

key_screens_behavior.faculty_live_session: Fullscreen rotating QR updated via socket 'qr:rotate' every 60s (poll fallback); live roster side panel with Present/Late counts animating in as scans arrive; close-session confirm with absents preview
key_screens_behavior.student_scanner: Camera scan → POST /attendance/scan → success screen (green, status Present/Late, time) or specific error (session closed, not enrolled, already recorded, expired code — prompts rescan since QR rotates every minute)
key_screens_behavior.monitoring: Filterable history grid; color-coded StatusBadge (Present=green, Late=amber, Absent=red, Excused=blue); override dialog with mandatory reason
key_screens_behavior.reports: Parameter form → preview table/charts → export buttons (CSV/XLSX/PDF); async exports show notification when ready

accessibility: Radix primitives give keyboard/focus/ARIA behavior for free
Focus-visible rings, skip-to-content link, semantic landmarks
Charts include accessible data table toggle
Color is never the only status indicator (badges carry text)

quality_tooling.testing: Vitest + React Testing Library (components/hooks), Playwright (E2E) — see ../testing/testing-definition.json
quality_tooling.type_safety: API response types from packages/shared; no anys in strict mode
